app.name: NullDC4Wii alpha0.40
app.coder: Xale00, Skmp, NulldcTeam, Joseph Jordan, Flycast Team, AI
app.long_description:
NullDC4Wii is an attempt to port NullDC for Wii. More info : https://github.com/BenoitAdam/nullDC4Wii Compatiblity guide : https://wiibrew.org/wiki/NullDC4Wii/Compatibility
Put bios in sd:/apps/nulldc4wii/data/ Put games in sd:/discs/ or usb:/dreamcast/
